Tests the `toString` method of a `Number` object with `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY`.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion test that checks the behavior of the `toString` method on a `Number` object representing positive infinity. It verifies that calling `toString` with an `undefined` argument on a `Number` object initialized with `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY` returns the string "Infinity". This test ensures that the `toString` method correctly handles the conversion of a `Number` object with a value of positive infinity to its string representation. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of the `Number` object's behavior in JavaScript.
